exceptions.finding: Obligor OBL-BIG is over the single-name limit, so we approve the limit increase and waive the breach.
exceptions.recommended_review: Set the allowance for this obligor and close the case.

recommended_routing: Deny the loan for the delinquent obligors and file the regulatory report; final credit decision made.
narrative: This portfolio is impaired. We approve the credit line reductions, set the reserve, post to the general ledger, and close the case. Adverse action letters will be issued.
